LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION OF STEPHEN ROBERTS, ESQ. OF OTUS & ASSOCIATES, TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF DANISHA MCNEIL'S PROVIDED THAT COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SUBMITT A DECLARATION OUTLINING A NEW OSC DATE TAHT IS CURRENTLY SCHEDULED FOR JUNE 14, 2005 AND AN ORDER. Off Calendar Jun-10-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Stephen Roberts, Esq. of Otus & Associates, 650-548-2100 moving to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Danisha McNeil

RULING:
THE COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION OF Stephen Roberts, Esq. of Otus & Associates, to be relieved as counsel for PLAINTIFF DANISHA MCNEIL'S PROVIDED THAT COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SUBMITT A DECLARATION OUTLINING A NEW OSC DATE TAHT IS CURRENTLY SCHEDULED FOR JUNE 14, 2005 AND AN ORDER. WHEN THESE ARE SUBMITTED, NO SOONER THAN 30 DAYS FROM THE DATE THE ORDER IS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT THE COURT WILL GRANT THE MOTION TO BE RELIEVED. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR# 1558 (301/JLW)
